title: Animal Walk Cards
description: A playful animal-movement routine with bear crawls, frog jumps, crab walks, flamingo balance, and a family parade.
learningGoals: Practice cardio movement through short playful rounds
Remember and chain movements into a parade sequence
interactionModel: tap the large done target after each animal movement; timed rounds coach short bursts and chain the parade sequence
feedbackModel: playful zookeeper speech gives every animal a sound moment, layered with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
